item.description:

item.title: RTEgaa: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 28min Paul Flynn's football championship predictions rte.ie Paul Flynn's football championship predict
item.description: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 28min Paul Flynn's football championship predictions rte.ie Paul Flynn's football championship predictions Paul Flynn runs the rule over this weekend's football championship, with four Leinster and two Ulster quarter-finals down for decision. 1 594
